Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court suspends Sally Mann as Administrator of the Estate of Judith Hearn. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on July 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear, why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed, and to show cause as to why sanctions should not be imposed and why the Administrator should not be removed. Status on close of estate and the prior order to appear are also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jun-26-2018 Continued To Jul-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Continued To Jun-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator and the Attorney to appear on June 26, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
